description: CompositionYellow round neck top made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline, short sleeves with foldover hems, and graphic and glitter print on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironFrance has always been the one-stop destination for the woman of fashion. Don the stylish looks of the Fench with this yellow top form jealous 21 and show off your French streak saying "Yes" in French with the lettering on the front. While the graphic print adds to this top a style of its own, the glitter print creates a niche fashion statement. The foldover sleeve hems accentuate your rounded arms perfectly, giving you that complete look. Team this cotton top with jeans, shorts or skirts and stylish sandals from the wide range at myntra for that casual, feminine look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
